$schema: Interaction sequence for driving VM installation.

$actions.delay: Wait a fixed number of seconds. Parameters: seconds (number).
$actions.key: Send a single keystroke. Parameters: name (string). Supported: Enter, Tab, Space, Escape, Up, Down, Left, Right, F1-F12.
$actions.type: Type a string of text. Parameters: text (string). Hyper-V only: uses Msvm_Keyboard.TypeText.
$actions.screenshot: Capture a screenshot for debugging. Parameters: label (string, used in filename).
$actions.waitForPort: Wait until a TCP port responds on the VM. Parameters: port (number), timeoutSeconds (number).
$actions.waitForHeartbeat: Wait until Hyper-V Integration Services heartbeat reports OK. Parameters: timeoutSeconds (number). Hyper-V only.

description: Ubuntu Desktop: dismiss GRUB 'Try or Install' menu then let autoinstall run unattended.

steps.description: Wait for GRUB menu to appear
Wait in case first Enter was too early
